description: An application or daemon deployed to one or more servers or to Fly.io. Explicit targets and servers selected by target_feature each produce an independent service instance.
title: Service

cloudflare_access_policy_group.description: A Cloudflare Access selector. Exactly one selector key must be present.

any_valid_service_token.description: Matches any valid Access service token.

login_method.description: Matches an identity provider login method.

credential_field.description: Configuration for one credential field stored in 1Password and exposed under runtime.credentials.

mode.description: Whether 1Password may be the source of truth for this field. rw fields create placeholders; ro fields are written from provider-generated values.

type.description: 1Password field type when purpose is not set.

credential_generator.description: Typed credential generator. Scalar generators seed a read-write 1Password field; x509 generates a read-only certificate and private-key pair.

length.description: Byte count for base64/hex; character count for alphanumeric.

common_name.description: Certificate subject common name. Defaults to the service identity name and credential name.

validity_period_hours.description: Certificate validity in hours. Defaults to the global X.509 credential value.

dashboard.description: Homepage service card data. Values are rendered directly into Homepage YAML after template interpolation; `group` and `name` are used to place the card.

features_overlay.description: Per-target feature overrides. Only specify the flags that differ from the service-level defaults.

mail.description: Per-target override. Provision credentials for the default SMTP provider, currently Resend. Exposes runtime.attributes.mail_from_address, runtime.attributes.mail_host, runtime.attributes.mail_port, runtime.attributes.mail_username, and runtime.credentials.mail_password as template variables.

monitoring.description: Per-target override. Include this service in generated monitoring configuration and expose runtime.credentials.monitoring_token to its templates. The generated token is unique per expanded service target.

monitoring_alerts.description: Per-target override. Attach generated monitoring alerts to this service when monitoring is enabled. Does not provision resources or expose template variables.

object_storage.description: Per-target override. Provision S3-compatible object storage using the default provider, currently Backblaze B2. Exposes runtime.attributes.object_storage_access_key_id, runtime.attributes.object_storage_bucket, runtime.attributes.object_storage_endpoint, and runtime.credentials.object_storage_secret_access_key as template variables.

oidc.description: Per-target override. Provision an OIDC client using the configured provider. Exposes runtime.attributes.{oidc_issuer_url,oidc_provider_name} and runtime.credentials.oidc_client_id, plus runtime.credentials.oidc_client_secret for confidential clients, as template variables. Stored in 1Password.

oidc_forward_auth.description: Per-target override. Protect generated Traefik routes with the shared OIDC OAuth2 Proxy forward-auth middleware. Internal routes retain the internal-only middleware first. Monitored routes also receive a per-target Basic Auth route for Gatus.

password.description: Per-target override. Generate a random password for this service. Exposes runtime.credentials.password and runtime.credentials.password_hash (bcrypt) as template variables. Stored in 1Password.

tailscale.description: Per-target override. Generate a Tailscale auth key for this service. Exposes runtime.credentials.tailscale_auth_key as a template variable. Used by services that run their own Tailscale node (e.g. Gatus on Fly.io).

app_name.description: Fly.io app name override. If empty, defaults to {organization.name}-{identity.name}; the matching {app_name}.fly.dev hostname is added to the computed service URLs.

cpu_kind.description: CPU type. 'shared' is cheaper and suitable for most workloads; 'performance' provides dedicated CPU time.

image.description: Pre-built Docker image to deploy (e.g. 'ghcr.io/owner/image:tag'). If empty, a Dockerfile in the service's template directory is used instead.

machine_count.description: Desired number of Fly Machines for this app. Null leaves the existing machine count unchanged.

memory_mb.description: RAM in MiB to allocate to each machine.

region.description: Fly.io primary region code (e.g. 'syd', 'lax'). Determines where machines are provisioned by default.

truenas_target.description: Configuration for TrueNAS catalog app deployments. Custom apps are inferred from docker-compose.yaml.tftpl in the service's template directory.

catalog_app.description: TrueNAS catalog app name. Defaults to identity.service when empty. Required when identity.service is null and this target should deploy a catalog app.

container.description: TrueNAS catalog container name used for generated routing labels. Defaults to the route container when empty.

env.description: TrueNAS catalog app environment variables rendered into additional_envs. Custom compose apps should put environment directly in docker-compose.yaml.tftpl. String values support template interpolation with ${defaults.*}, ${server.*}, ${servers.*}, ${service.*}, and ${services.*}. String arrays render as '+'-joined values.

port_key.description: Primary TrueNAS network port key that receives routing.host_port as port_number.

credentials.description: Manual fields and typed generated credentials exposed under runtime.credentials.

fields.description: Credential fields keyed by field name.

generated.description: Typed credential generators keyed by credential name.

source.description: Where username/password credentials come from. service uses service.identity.username and service-generated password fields. target inherits the target server username and password.

dashboard.description: Homepage dashboard cards for this service. Standard name, description, group, icon, href, and siteMonitor fields default from the service model; card values override them. The icon defaults to identity.service. Omit or set [] to render no cards.

data.description: General-purpose service data exposed to templates as service.data and data. Values may be any JSON shape. String values support template interpolation with ${defaults.*}, ${server.*}, ${servers.*}, ${service.*}, and ${services.*}.

features.description: Service-level feature flags applied to every target unless a target overrides them.

mail.description: Provision credentials for the default SMTP provider, currently Resend. Exposes runtime.attributes.mail_from_address, runtime.attributes.mail_host, runtime.attributes.mail_port, runtime.attributes.mail_username, and runtime.credentials.mail_password as template variables.

monitoring.description: Include this service in generated monitoring configuration and expose runtime.credentials.monitoring_token to its templates. The generated token is unique per expanded service target.

monitoring_alerts.description: Attach generated monitoring alerts to this service when monitoring is enabled. Does not provision resources or expose template variables.

object_storage.description: Provision S3-compatible object storage using the default provider, currently Backblaze B2. Exposes runtime.attributes.object_storage_access_key_id, runtime.attributes.object_storage_bucket, runtime.attributes.object_storage_endpoint, and runtime.credentials.object_storage_secret_access_key as template variables.

oidc.description: Provision an OIDC client using the configured provider. Exposes runtime.attributes.{oidc_issuer_url,oidc_provider_name} and runtime.credentials.oidc_client_id, plus runtime.credentials.oidc_client_secret for confidential clients, as template variables. Configure callback URL paths or absolute URLs in data.oidc_callback_urls, and optional public-client and PKCE behavior in data.oidc_is_public and data.oidc_pkce_enabled. Stored in 1Password.

oidc_forward_auth.description: Protect generated Traefik routes with the shared OIDC OAuth2 Proxy forward-auth middleware. Internal routes retain the internal-only middleware first. Monitored routes also receive a per-target Basic Auth route for Gatus.

password.description: Generate a random password for this service. Exposes runtime.credentials.password and runtime.credentials.password_hash (bcrypt) as template variables. Stored in 1Password.

tailscale.description: Generate a Tailscale auth key for this service. Exposes runtime.credentials.tailscale_auth_key as a template variable. Used by services that run their own Tailscale node (e.g. Gatus on Fly.io).

identity.description: Human-readable dashboard metadata for this service. The service name is derived from the YAML filename.

description.description: One-line description of what this service does. Shown in dashboards and status pages.

group.description: Dashboard group. Defaults to the target server description for server-targeted services or Applications when no target server exists.

service.description: Implementation key used to select templates from templates/services/{service}. Null means inventory/dashboard-only and no service-specific deploy artifacts.

title.description: Display name shown in Homepage, 1Password, and monitoring (e.g. 'Vaultwarden').

username.description: Admin username for this service. Stored in 1Password alongside the generated password.

imports.description: Explicit server and service dependencies exposed to this service template under local aliases.

servers.description: Map of local alias to a server key. Imported servers are exposed to templates as servers.{alias}.

services.description: Map of local alias to an explicit target-expanded service key. Imported services are exposed to templates as services.{alias}.

routing.description: Shared backend configuration and routes exposed by this service.

backend_port.description: Default container listening port used by Traefik and Fly.io.

backend_scheme.description: Default protocol used to reach the backend. Empty disables hostname derivation.

backend_url.description: Default Cloudflare Tunnel origin URL. Defaults to the target server's local Traefik webinternal entrypoint.

container.description: Default container that receives generated Traefik labels. Empty uses identity.service.

host_port.description: Default published host port. Null uses backend_port.

https.description: Whether route URLs use HTTPS by default.

https_verify.description: Whether health checks validate TLS certificates by default.

labels.description: Default extra Traefik labels. Values support template interpolation.

routes.description: Additional routes that inherit shared routing fields and may override route-specific backend and TLS settings. Services with a backend port or scheme also receive a derived internal route.

backend_url.description: Override the Cloudflare Tunnel origin URL.

cloudflare_access.description: Cloudflare Zero Trust Access applications protecting this route. Each entry creates a cloudflare_zero_trust_access_application resource for this route's hostname and path.

items.description: Cloudflare Zero Trust Access application configuration.

allowed_idps.description: List of IDP aliases from config.cloudflare.access.identity_providers to restrict authentication to. Omit to allow all configured IDPs.

auto_redirect_to_identity.description: Whether to automatically redirect unauthenticated users to the identity provider login page.

name.description: Display name for the access application.

path.description: URI path pattern for the access application destination appended to the route hostname. Defaults to '/*' which protects all paths.

policies.description: Access policies applied to this application. Each policy defines a decision and the groups it applies to.

items.description: A Cloudflare Access policy that defines who can or cannot reach the application.

decision.description: Policy decision type. 'allow' permits access, 'bypass' skips authentication, 'deny' blocks access.

name.description: Policy display name. Defaults to a name derived from the decision type.

precedence.description: Policy evaluation order. Lower values are evaluated first. Defaults to the policy index + 1.

require.description: Groups that must additionally satisfy this policy.

session_duration.description: Duration of the access session (e.g. '24h', '12h', '30m'). Omit to use the Cloudflare default.

cloudflare_rate_limiting_rules.description: Cloudflare rate limiting rules applied to this route's zone. Rules are grouped by zone and applied via a cloudflare_ruleset for the http_ratelimit phase.

items.description: A Cloudflare rate limiting rule applied at the zone level.

action.description: Action taken when the rate limit threshold is exceeded.

description.description: Human-readable description of the rate limiting rule.

expression.description: Cloudflare filter expression scoping the rate limit. Use true to match all traffic.

characteristics.description: Keys used to group requests for counting. Use cf.unique_visitor_id for per-device limits.

period.description: Time window in seconds in which matching requests are counted.

requests_per_period.description: Maximum number of requests allowed in the period before the action is taken.

cloudflare_waf_rules.description: Cloudflare WAF custom rules applied to this route's zone. Rules are grouped by zone and applied via cloudflare_ruleset.

items.description: A Cloudflare WAF custom rule applied at the zone level.

action.description: Action taken when the expression matches.

expression.description: Cloudflare WAF expression in the Rules language. Supports template interpolation with defaults, server, servers, service, and explicitly imported services.

container.description: Override the container receiving generated Traefik labels.

host.description: Custom hostname, or null to derive one from the service and exposure path.

https.description: Override whether the route URL uses HTTPS.

https_verify.description: Override whether health checks validate the TLS certificate.

id.description: Stable route identity used for generated DNS and Traefik names. Defaults to the expanded route list index when omitted.

redirects.description: Additional hostnames that permanently redirect to this route while preserving the path and query string. Exposure follows the canonical route, except Cloudflare routes use direct external Traefik exposure so ACME can cover deep aliases.

target_feature.description: Server feature used to create automatic targets. Empty disables automatic targeting.

targets.description: Explicit deployment targets for this service. May be omitted when target_feature supplies every target. Map keys are server keys (e.g. 'au-malatang') or 'fly' for Fly.io.

additionalProperties.description: Per-target configuration. Each section is optional and only the platforms relevant to the target need be present.

credentials.description: Per-target credential fields merged with service-level fields.

fields.description: Per-target credential fields keyed by field name.

data.description: Per-target service data overlay. Object values deep-merge with service-level data; arrays, strings, numbers, booleans, and null replace service-level data.

features.description: Per-target feature overrides merged with service-level feature flags.
